name: Check If LP Rebalance Needed
description: Check whether a Uniswap V3 LP position has drifted out of range and needs rebalancing
detail: Reads the position's tick range from the NonfungiblePositionManager, discovers the pool via the factory, and compares the current tick against the position's tick range (expanded by a configurable buffer). Use as a condition action in automation strategies — triggers the rebalance flow only when the position is genuinely out of range. A bufferBps of 0 triggers immediately when the tick exits the position range; larger values add tolerance before rebalancing.
triggers: is LP position out of range

tokenId.description: NFT token ID of the LP position to check

bufferBps.description: Tolerance buffer in basis points — widens the no-rebalance zone beyond the position range (0 = rebalance immediately when tick exits range)

examples.input: Check if my LP position #12345 needs rebalancing
Check if LP position #12345 is out of range with 1% buffer
